name: Mohamed Akour
summary: Full Stack Developer with 5 years of experience, specialized in Microsoft technologies (.NET, Azure, DevOps). Skilled at transforming complex business requirements into robust web solutions. Proactive, detail-oriented, and passionate about technological innovation.

impact.title: Reserved Capacity cost investigation
impact.description: Traced an unexpected Azure cost spike to its root cause and resolved it through Reserved Capacity analysis, correcting the billing model rather than just cutting resources.

impact.title: Private endpoint security for Eurotax
impact.description: Modernized CI/CD pipelines and hardened Key Vault access via private endpoints for the Eurotax environment, closing off public network exposure.

impact.title: Partner & fiduciary access model
impact.description: Built a multi-tenant .NET Web API skeleton with role-based access control, giving partner and fiduciary clients isolated, permissioned access to shared infrastructure.

impact.title: Cross-tenant data reliability
impact.description: Set up GTID-based MySQL replication across tenant databases for consistent, recoverable data across environments.

experience.title: .NET Analyst Developer
highlights: Participated in client meetings for requirements gathering and demonstrations, tracking project tasks in Jira
Contributed to redesign, continuous improvement, and feature development of ASP.NET applications, including move-expert.com and eurotax.fr, across backend and cloud integration
Performed debugging, code optimization, and quality assurance testing for performance and stability
Investigated and resolved an Azure cost spike through Reserved Capacity analysis
Modernized CI/CD pipelines with Azure DevOps and hardened Key Vault access via private endpoints for the Eurotax environment
Built a multi-tenant .NET Web API skeleton with role-based access control for partner/fiduciary clients
Managed databases and Azure infrastructure, including resource groups, virtual networks, and virtual machines for application hosting
Set up GTID-based MySQL replication across tenant databases
Configured cross-cloud backup strategies (Azure to AWS FSx via Veeam) and implemented multi-cloud data replication

experience.title: Intern, .NET Developer
highlights: Learned the company's N-Tier and MVC software architecture
Gained experience with development tools such as Visual Studio, Bitbucket, and SQL Server
Assisted in developing new features, fixing bugs, and conducting functional testing under supervision
Contributed to the maintenance of internal projects

experience.title: Web Developer
highlights: Improved an existing web application for insurance claim experts
Designed and developed a stock management web application
Worked with PHP, Laravel, MySQL, Axios, OCR, Git, and GitHub
